description: Letter from the son of the Nezer (i.e., Mevorakh b. Natan b. Shemuel) to the notable Netanʾel b. Avraham, a physician living in the Rif (and muqaddam of al-Mahalla, see T-S 10J20.21 (PGPID 2950)), recommending the cantor Abū l-Bayan Moshe b. ha-Hazzan al-Ahuv (i.e., Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi) who traveled to the Rif in order to collect money for his capitation tax. The young man is recommended as one growing up among the hazzanim in the time of Sar Shalom - may his name live forever - and in our own time. (Information mainly from Goitein's note card and S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society, 2:389–90, 612.) EMS. ASE.
tags: tax, jaliya, jizya, capitation tax, 12th c, Moshe b. Levi, recommendation
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
